reviews.comment:
Me encanta, los baños están súper limpios siempre, yo trabajo de reparto y voy seguido, hay agua caliente gratis excelente servicio.

(Translated by Google)
I love it, the bathrooms are always super clean, I work as a delivery driver and I go there often, there's free hot water and excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMMHMtYkpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar que siempre pasamos volviendo de Mendoza Córdoba impecable

(Translated by Google)
A place we always pass by on our way back from Mendoza to Córdoba, it's impeccable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6djZmdy13RRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación está justo en la ruta en la entrada a Carmen de Areco ... Lo que nos gustó mucho es que tiene una parte de atrás con parrillas para parar y hacer un asadito ... Ni te das cuenta que estás ahí nomás de la ruta. Muy tranquilo ...

(Translated by Google)
The station is right on the highway at the entrance to Carmen de Areco... What we really liked is that it has a back area with grills where you can stop and have a barbecue... You don't even realize you're so close to the highway. Very peaceful...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6N2ZXRmtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te cobran lo que quieren. Árabe que figura 2900 te quieren cobrar 3600, x estar tostado… irrisorio.

(Translated by Google)
They charge you whatever they want. An Arab who says 2900 wants to charge you 3600, just because you're toast... ridiculous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6MGY3WVZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Una muy buena opcion para cargar combustible en el vehiculo  y tambien comer algo. Tienen variedad de alfajores, fiambres y otros articulos regionales. Cuenta con un hermoso lugar para poder parar si estas con una casa rodante.

(Translated by Google)
A great option for refueling your vehicle and grabbing a bite to eat. They have a variety of alfajores, cold cuts, and other regional products. It also has a lovely spot to stop if you're traveling with a camper van.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6c3NXczdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio el lugar , los baños. Y venden de todo

(Translated by Google)
